Ceaseless Edge.name: Ceaseless Edge
Ceaseless Edge.effect: The target is put in a Vortex. Ceaseless Edge is a Critical Hit on a 19+.

Wildbolt Storm.name: Wildbolt Storm
Wildbolt Storm.effect: The target is Paralyzed on a 15+.

Springtide Storm.name: Springtide Storm
Springtide Storm.effect: If the user is not in Therian Forme, the user has each of its stats raised by +1 CS on a 16+. If the user is in Therian Form, the target has each of its stats lowered by -1 CS on a 16+.

Triple Arrows.name: Triple Arrows
Triple Arrows.effect: Targets hit by Triple Arrows lose 1 CS in both Defense and Special Defense. After attacking with Triple Arrows, hit or miss, the user may Disengage 2m and attack a different target with Triple Arrows. This effect may be repeated a second time, targeting a creature that has not been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering all remaining additional shifts and attacks. Triple Arrows gains +1 Accuracy and +1 DB for each attack that is given up. Triple Arrows always benefits from the Technician Ability. Once Daily, after all attacks with Triple Arrows have been resolved, the user becomes Pumped. While Pumped, the user’s Critical Range is extended by 2, or 18+ if the Critical Range is not otherwise extended. Being switched will cause this effect to end.

Triple Kick.name: Triple Kick
Triple Kick.effect: After attacking with Triple Kick, hit or miss, the user may Disengage 2m and attack a different target with Triple Kick. This effect may be repeated a second time, targeting a creature that has not been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering all remaining additional shifts and attacks. Triple Kick gains +1 Accuracy and +2 DB for each attack that is given up. Triple Kick always benefits from the Technician Ability.

Victory Dance.name: Victory Dance
Victory Dance.effect: If the user performs a Fighting Move on their next turn that deals damage, add its Damage Dice Roll an extra time to the damage. Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Raging Fury.name: Raging Fury
Raging Fury.effect: The user becomes Enraged. Legal targets become Enraged on a 16+.

Bleakwind Storm.name: Bleakwind Storm
Bleakwind Storm.effect: The target is Flinched on a 15+ and Frozen on a 19+.

Bitter Malice.name: Bitter Malice
Bitter Malice.effect: Legal targets hit by Bitter Malice are Stuck and Trapped until the end of their next turn on a 19+. Once a Scene, if Bitter Malice’s target has a Status Condition, you may have Bitter Malice’s Damage Base be 12 instead (3d12+10 / 30).

Infernal Parade.name: Infernal Parade
Infernal Parade.effect: Legal targets hit by Infernal Parade are Burned on a 17+. Once a Scene, if at least one of Infernal Parade’s targets has a Status Condition, you may have Infernal Parade’s Damage Base be 12 instead (3d12+10 / 30).

Chloroblast.name: Chloroblast
Chloroblast.effect: The user’s Hit Points are reduced by 50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way.

Headlong Rush.name: Headlong Rush
Headlong Rush.effect: The user’s Defense and Special Defense are each lowered by -1 Combat Stage. Headlong Rush may be used as a Free Action at the end of a Sprint Maneuver taken as a Standard Action, as long as the user Shifted at least 3 meters in a straight line towards the target. When used this way, Headlong Rush Trips the target on a hit.

Sandstorm Sear.name: Sandstorm Sear
Sandstorm Sear.effect: The target is Burned on a 15+

Mountain Gale.name: Mountain Gale
Mountain Gale.effect: The target is Flinched on a 15+.

Power Shift.name: Power Shift
Power Shift.effect: The user’s Attack stat and Defense stat are switched and the user’s Special Attack stat and Special Defense stat are switched. These changes last for the remainder of the scene, or until the user is switched out or Fainted.

Barb Barrage.name: Barb Barrage
Barb Barrage.effect: The target is Poisoned on a 17+. Once a Scene, if Barb Barrage’s target has a Status Condition, you may choose to not roll for Five Strike. Instead, treat Barb Barrage as though it automatically rolled an 8 for Five Strike.

Dire Claw.name: Dire Claw
Dire Claw.effect: Dire Claw is a Critical Hit on a 19+. Dire Claw gives the target a Status ailment on a 15+. If this is triggered, roll 1d3; on 1 the target is Poisoned; on 2 the target is Paralyzed; on 3 the target is Flinched.

Esper Wing.name: Esper Wing
Esper Wing.effect: Esper Wing is a Critical Hit on an 18+.

Lunar Blessing.name: Lunar Blessing
Lunar Blessing.effect: The user regains hit points equal to 50% of its Hit Point total, cures all of its Status conditions, and gains +2 Evasion.

Mystical Power.name: Mystical Power
Mystical Power.effect: The user receives +1 Combat Stage in their highest non-HP stat.

Psyshield Bash.name: Psyshield Bash
Psyshield Bash.effect: The user gains +5 DR for one full round.

Take Heart.name: Take Heart
Take Heart.effect: The user gains +1 CS in all its stats and cures all of its Status conditions.

Stone Axe.name: Stone Axe
Stone Axe.effect: Stone Axe is a critical hit on an 18+. Once per scene, on a hit, the target may be put in a Vortex.

Shelter.name: Shelter
Shelter.effect: The user gains +1 CS in Defense and Special Defense, and +2 Evasion.

Skitter Smack.name: Skitter Smack
Skitter Smack.effect: The user Shifts up to its Overland Capability, ignoring Attacks of Opportunity, before attacking with Skitter Smack. On a hit, the target’s Special Attack is lowered 1 CS.

Fiery Wrath.name: Fiery Wrath
Fiery Wrath.effect: Fiery Wrath Flinches the target on a 17+. Once per Scene, Fiery Wrath may instead be used as a FireType Move.

Jaw Lock.name: Jaw Lock
Jaw Lock.effect: You may perform a Grapple Maneuver against the target as a Free Action.

Lash Out.name: Lash Out
Lash Out.effect: If the user has lost CS from a source other than itself since the end of its last turn, Lash Out is instead DB 15 (4d10 + 20 / 45). Any given foe may be the target of this increased damage only once per Scene.

Obstruct.name: Obstruct
Obstruct.effect: If the user is hit by a Move, the user may use Obstruct. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. In addition, if the triggering attack was Melee ranged, the attacker’s Defense is lowered by 2 Combat Stages.

Wicked Blow.name: Wicked Blow
Wicked Blow.effect: If Wicked Blow hits, it is a Critical Hit. The target is Pushed 6 meters minus their Weight Class. On a roll of 15+, the target is also Tripped.

Breaking Swipe.name: Breaking Swipe
Breaking Swipe.effect: The target’s Attack is lowered 1 CS.

Clangorous Soul.name: Clangorous Soul
Clangorous Soul.effect: The user loses 1/3rd of their Max Hit Points and has each of its stats raised by +1 Combat Stage.

Dragon Energy.name: Dragon Energy
Dragon Energy.effect: For each 10% of HP the user is missing, Dragon Energy’s Damage Base is reduced by 1.

Dynamax Cannon.name: Dynamax Cannon
Dynamax Cannon.effect: The DB of Dynamax Cannon increases by +2 for each positive CS the target has, to a maximum of DB 20.

Scale Shot.name: Scale Shot
Scale Shot.effect: The user’s Speed is raised 1 CS, and the user’s Defense is lowered 1 CS.

Aura Wheel.name: Aura Wheel
Aura Wheel.effect: The user’s Speed is increased 1 CS.

Bolt Beak.name: Bolt Beak
Bolt Beak.effect: Against targets with a lower initiative that have not yet acted this round, Bolt Beak deals +10 damage.

Magnetic Flux.name: Magnetic Flux
Magnetic Flux.effect: Choose +1 or -1. All targets that are ElectricType or have the Magnetic Capability receive that many Defense and Special Defense Combat Stages.

Rising Voltage.name: Rising Voltage
Rising Voltage.effect: After Rising Voltage is resolved, you may create Electric Terrain in a Blast 7, centered on the user, that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Electric Terrain, rather than any other Field Move. This Effect may trigger only once per Scene.

Thunder Cage.name: Thunder Cage
Thunder Cage.effect: The targets are trapped in a Vortex. The DC to escape the Vortex is increased by 3.

Decorate.name: Decorate
Decorate.effect: The target gains +2 CS in both Attack and Special Attack.

Misty Explosion.name: Misty Explosion
Misty Explosion.effect: The user’s Hit Points are set to -50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way. After Misty Explosion is resolved, create Misty Terrain in a Blast 7, centered on the user, that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Misty Terrain, rather than any other Field Move.

Spirit Break.name: Spirit Break
Spirit Break.effect: The target’s Special Attack stat is lowered 1 CS.

Body Press.name: Body Press
Body Press.effect: The user’s Defense Stat is added to the damage roll instead of the Attack Stat.

Coaching.name: Coaching
Coaching.effect: The user and any allies in the Burst have their Attack and Defense raised by 1 CS.

No Retreat.name: No Retreat
No Retreat.effect: The user gains +1 CS in each stat. In addition, the user may not be recalled or switched out until the end of the Scene, and counts as Slowed for the purposes of any movement that would end further away from the nearest enemy than the user started.

Octolock.name: Octolock
Octolock.effect: The user initiates a Grapple Maneuver with the target, which automatically hits. If successful, until the user no longer has Dominance in the grapple, the target is Trapped and loses 1 CS in Defense and Special Defense at the end of each of their turns.

Thunderous Kick.name: Thunderous Kick
Thunderous Kick.effect: All legal targets hit lose 1 Defense Combat Stage. Once per Scene, Thunderous Kick may instead be used as an Electric-Type Move.

Burning Jealousy.name: Burning Jealousy
Burning Jealousy.effect: After Burning Jealousy has resolved, the user may choose to Burn foes within 5m that have had any CS raised since the beginning of that foe’s last turn. This Effect may trigger only once per Scene.

Astral Barrage.name: Astral Barrage
Astral Barrage.effect: Legal targets hit by Astral Barrage are Slowed for one full round.

Poltergeist.name: Poltergeist
Poltergeist.effect: If a target is holding a Held Item or Main or OffHand item, they must either drop it immediately or lose a Tick of Hit Points. This may only cause a target to lose at most one Tick of Hit Points, no matter how many items they were holding. On each of the target’s subsequent turns, if it is still holding the item(s) in question it loses a Tick of Hit Points.

Apple Acid.name: Apple Acid
Apple Acid.effect: The target’s Special Defense is lowered by 1 CS.

Drum Beating.name: Drum Beating
Drum Beating.effect: The target’s Speed is lowered by 1 CS.

Grassy Glide.name: Grassy Glide
Grassy Glide.effect: If the user is on Grassy Terrain, Grassy Glide may be used with Priority. After Grassy Glide has been resolved, the user may choose to create Grassy Terrain in the spaces Passed over (including those it started and ended in), that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Grassy Terrain, rather than any other Field Move.

Grav Apple.name: Grav Apple
Grav Apple.effect: The target’s Defense is lowered by 1 CS.

Jungle Healing.name: Jungle Healing
Jungle Healing.effect: The user and any allies in the burst regain Hit Points equal to 1/4 of their Maximum Hit Point Value, and are cured of any Persistent or Volatile Status Conditions.

Snap Trap.name: Snap Trap
Snap Trap.effect: The target is trapped in a Vortex. The DC to escape the Vortex is increased by 3.

Scorching Sands.name: Scorching Sands
Scorching Sands.effect: Scorching Sands Burns the target on 15+.

Glacial Lance.name: Glacial Lance
Glacial Lance.effect: Legal targets hit by Glacial Lance are Stuck and Trapped until the end of their next turn.

Triple Axel.name: Triple Axel
Triple Axel.effect: After attacking with Triple Axel, hit or miss, the user may Disengage 2m and attack a different target with Triple Axel. This effect may be repeated a second time, targeting a creature that has not been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering all remaining additional shifts and attacks. Triple Axel gains +1 Accuracy and +1 DB for each attack that is given up. Triple Axel always benefits from the Technician Ability.

Court Change.name: Court Change
Court Change.effect: All Blessings and Hazards swap which side that they belong to.

Howl.name: Howl
Howl.effect: The user and all allies in the Burst have their Attack CS raised by 1.

Multi-Attack.name: Multi-Attack
Multi-Attack.effect: Multi-Attack is the same Type as the Memory Disc, Plate, or Drive Item held.

Rapid Spin.name: Rapid Spin
Rapid Spin.effect: Rapid Spin destroys all Hazards within 5 meters, removes Leech Seeds, and removes the user’s Trapped or Stuck status. If Rapid Spin hits, the user’s speed raises 1 CS.

Stuff Cheeks.name: Stuff Cheeks
Stuff Cheeks.effect: The user immediately consumes one of its Food Buffs, regardless of any conditions that need to be met, gaining its benefit if applicable. If a Buff is consumed, the user’s Defense CS is raised by 2.

Teatime.name: Teatime
Teatime.effect: All participants in the battle may choose to immediately consume one of their Food Buffs, regardless of if the conditions to do so are met.

Terrain Pulse.name: Terrain Pulse
Terrain Pulse.effect: If the user is under the effects of a Terrain, Terrain Pulse has a Damage Base of 10 (3d8+10 / 24). In addition, Terrain Pulse becomes the Type that corresponds with the Move that creates that Terrain. (For example, if in Misty Terrain, it would become Fairy Type.) If the user is under the effects of multiple Terrains, choose one to affect this Move.

Corrosive Gas.name: Corrosive Gas
Corrosive Gas.effect: Targets hit have their current Held Item(s) unable to be used for the remainder of the Scene. In addition, Steel-Type targets hit lose their immunity to Poison until they Faint or Take A Breather; Poison instead counts as neutral against Steel.

Shell Side Arm.name: Shell Side Arm
Shell Side Arm.effect: This attack uses the highest of the user’s Attack or Special Attack Stat, though this does not change the Class of the Move. In addition, if the target’s Defense is lower than its Special Defense, this attack targets Defense, becoming a Physical Move. The target is poisoned on a 17+.

Eerie Spell.name: Eerie Spell
Eerie Spell.effect: The user may choose to Disable the target’s last Move used. This effect may only be activated once per Scene.

Expanding Force.name: Expanding Force
Expanding Force.effect: After Expanding Force is resolved, you may create Psychic Terrain in a Blast 7, centered on the user, that lasts for 5 turns. Any creatures in those spaces are affected as if by the Field Move Psychic Terrain, rather than any other Field Move. This Effect may trigger only once per Scene.

Freezing Glare.name: Freezing Glare
Freezing Glare.effect: Freezing Glare Freezes the target on a 19+. Once per Scene, Freezing Glare may instead be used as an Ice-Type Move.

Magic Powder.name: Magic Powder
Magic Powder.effect: The target gains the Psychic Type in addition to its other Types for 5 turns.

Tar Shot.name: Tar Shot
Tar Shot.effect: The target gains a Coat that is automatically expended upon being hit with a Fire Type attack in order to make them one step more vulnerable to that attack. In addition, the target’s Speed is lowered by 1 CS.

Behemoth Bash.name: Behemoth Bash
Behemoth Bash.effect: The DB of Behemoth Bash increases by +2 for each positive CS the target has, to a maximum of DB 20.

Behemoth Blade.name: Behemoth Blade
Behemoth Blade.effect: The DB of Behemoth Blade increases by +2 for each positive CS the target has, to a maximum of DB 20.

Double Iron Bash.name: Double Iron Bash
Double Iron Bash.effect: Double Iron Bash Flinches the targets on 15+. This move is affected by Iron Fist.

Gear Up.name: Gear Up
Gear Up.effect: All targets that are Steel-Typed receive +1 Attack and Special Attack Combat Stages

Steel Beam.name: Steel Beam
Steel Beam.effect: The user’s Hit Points are reduced by 50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way.

Steel Roller.name: Steel Roller
Steel Roller.range: Melee, Pass, Dash, Smite, Spirit Surge
Steel Roller.effect: Legal targets hit by Steel Roller are Tripped on a roll of 15+. Any Hazards in spaces Passed through or adjacent to those spaces are removed (they are removed before they can affect the user). If the user moves through an area of Terrain, or a Field-range Terrain is active, those effects immediately end.

Fishious Rend.name: Fishious Rend
Fishious Rend.effect: Against targets with a lower initiative that have not yet acted this round, Fishious Rend deals +10 damage.

Flip Turn.name: Flip Turn
Flip Turn.effect: If Flip Turn successfully hits its target, the user deals damage and then immediately is returned to its Poké Ball in the same turn. A New Pokémon may immediately be sent out. Using Flip Turn lets a Trapped user be recalled.

Life Dew.name: Life Dew
Life Dew.effect: The user and all allies in the burst regain Hit Points equal to 1/4 of their Maximum Hit Points.

Snipe Shot.name: Snipe Shot
Snipe Shot.effect: Snipe Shot is a Critical Hit on 18+. This Move may not be Intercepted, nor may any Abilities, Moves, or Features be activated to change this Move’s target. Any of those existing effects (such as Follow Me) fail.

Surging Strikes.name: Surging Strikes
Surging Strikes.effect: If Surging Strikes hits, it is a Critical Hit. After attacking with Surging Strikes, hit or miss, the user may Shift 2m, ignoring Attacks of Opportunity from their target. It may then make an additional attack with this Move on a different target. This effect may be repeated a second time, the third attack targeting a creature that has not yet been targeted by either prior attack. Before making each attack roll, the user can elect to give up triggering all remaining additional shifts and attacks. Surging Strikes gains +3 DB for each attack that is given up.

Fell Stinger.name: Fell Stinger
Fell Stinger.effect: If the user successfully knocks out a target with Fell Stinger, raise their Attack by 2 Combat Stages.

First Impression.name: First Impression
First Impression.effect: You may only use First Impression with Priority upon joining an encounter; if you do, First Impression Flinches the target. Switching out resets the requirement of joining an encounter.

Leech Life.name: Leech Life
Leech Life.effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.effect: Lunge may be used as a Free Action at the end of a Sprint Maneuver taken as a Standard Action, as long as the user Shifted at least 3 meters in a straight line towards the target. When used this way, Lunge's target receives a -5 penalty to damage rolls for 1 round.

Pollen Puff.name: Pollen Puff
Pollen Puff.effect: Once per Scene, Pollen Puff may instead be used on an ally; when used this way, the target recovers 50% of their maximum Hit Points and the Move has the Healing keyword.

Dark Void.name: Dark Void
Dark Void.effect: The target falls Asleep. Once per Scene, Dark Void may be used as if its range were “Burst 5, Friendly” instead.

Darkest Lariat.name: Darkest Lariat
Darkest Lariat.effect: This Move ignores the target’s positive Defense Combat Stages and all Damage Reduction.

Hyperspace Fury.name: Hyperspace Fury
Hyperspace Fury.effect: Interrupts may not be triggered against Hyperspace Fury. The user’s Defense is lowered by -1 Combat Stage.

Power Trip.name: Power Trip
Power Trip.effect: This Move gains +2 to its Damage Base for every positive Combat Stage held by the user, to a maximum of DB 20.

Sucker Punch.name: Sucker Punch
Sucker Punch.effect: If an adjacent foe targets the user with a Damaging Attack, Sucker Punch may be used as an Interrupt Move against the triggering foe.

Throat Chop.name: Throat Chop
Throat Chop.effect: The target cannot use Moves with the Sonic keyword for the next two turns.

Clanging Scales.name: Clanging Scales
Clanging Scales.effect: The user adds half their Defense Stat to Clanging Scale's Damage Roll. After the Move is resolved, the user's Defense is lowered by 1 CS.

Core Enforcer.name: Core Enforcer
Core Enforcer.effect: Each target has its Ability disabled until the end of the encounter. If a target has more than one Ability, you choose one of them to disable.

Parabolic Charge.name: Parabolic Charge
Parabolic Charge.effect: After the targets take damage, the user gains Hit Points equal to half of the total damage they dealt to all targets.

Plasma Fists.name: Plasma Fists
Plasma Fists.effect: The target’s next damaging Normal Type Move instead becomes Electric Type.

Thunder Wave.name: Thunder Wave
Thunder Wave.effect: Thunder Wave Paralyzes the target. Targets immune to Electric Attacks are immune to Thunder Wave’s effects.

Zing Zap.name: Zing Zap
Zing Zap.effect: Zing Zap Flinches the target on 15+.

Fleur Cannon.name: Fleur Cannon
Fleur Cannon.effect: Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

Floral Healing.name: Floral Healing
Floral Healing.effect: The target regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value. If the field is Grassy Terrain, the target gains 2/3 of its full Hit Point value instead.

Nature’s Madness.name: Nature’s Madness
Nature’s Madness.effect: The target loses 1/2 of their current Hit Points.

Flying Press.name: Flying Press
Flying Press.effect: Flying Press may deal Flying Type damage if the user wishes.

Burn Up.name: Burn Up
Burn Up.effect: Until the end of the encounter, the user loses its Fire-Type. Pure Fire-Types instead become Normal-Type.

Fire Lash.name: Fire Lash
Fire Lash.effect: The target’s Defense is lowered by 1 Combat Stage.

Mind Blown.name: Mind Blown
Mind Blown.effect: The user’s Hit Points are reduced by 50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way.

Shell Trap.name: Shell Trap
Shell Trap.effect: If the user is hit by a Melee attack, they may use Shell Trap as an Interrupt.

Beak Blast.name: Beak Blast
Beak Blast.effect: Beak Blast must be declared at the start of the round. If the user is hit by a Melee attack this round, their attacker is Burned. At the end of the round, the user may shift and attack with Beak Blast.

Moongeist Beam.name: Moongeist Beam
Moongeist Beam.effect: This Move ignores any Abilities that would cause it to fail or miss, such as Dodge or Wonder Guard; those Abilities cannot be activated in response to Moongeist Beam.

Shadow Bone.name: Shadow Bone
Shadow Bone.effect: The target’s Defense is lowered by 1 Combat Stage on a 17+.

Spectral Thief.name: Spectral Thief
Spectral Thief.effect: Before rolling damage, transfer all Combat Stages on the target to the user.

Spirit Shackle.name: Spirit Shackle
Spirit Shackle.effect: The Target is Trapped for 2 rounds.

Solar Blade.name: Solar Blade
Solar Blade.effect: The user attacks with Solar Blade. If the weather is Rainy, Sandstorming, or Hailing, Solar Blade’s Damage Base is lowered to 6 (2d6+8 / 15).

Strength Sap.name: Strength Sap
Strength Sap.effect: The user gains Hit Points equal to the higher of the target's Attack or Special Attack; the target then loses 1 Combat Stage in that Stat.

Trop Kick.name: Trop Kick
Trop Kick.effect: The target receives a -5 penalty to damage rolls for 1 round.

High Horsepower.name: High Horsepower
High Horsepower.effect: High Horsepower may be used as a Free Action at the end of a Sprint Maneuver taken as a Standard Action, as long as the user Shifted at least 3 meters in a straight line towards the target. When used this way, High Horsepower gains Smite.

Shore Up.name: Shore Up
Shore Up.effect: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value. If it is Sand Storming, the user gains 2/3 of its full Hit Point value instead. If it is Sunny, Rainy or Hailing the user gains 1/4 of their full Hit Point value instead.

Stomping Tantrum.name: Stomping Tantrum
Stomping Tantrum.effect: If the user’s last attack failed or missed, Stomping Tantrum is DB 15 (4d10+10 / 45) instead.

Thousand Arrows.name: Thousand Arrows
Thousand Arrows.effect: When calculating Weakness and Resistance for Thousand Arrows, Flying-Typed targets calculate damage as if Flying was neutral to Ground. Thousand Arrows ignores the Levitate ability. The target is knocked down to ground level, and loses all Sky or Levitate Speeds for 3 turns. During this time, they may be hit by Ground-Type Moves even if normally immune.

Thousand Waves.name: Thousand Waves
Thousand Waves.effect: Legal Targets are Trapped for 2 rounds.

Aurora Veil.name: Aurora Veil
Aurora Veil.effect: Blessing – Any user affected by Aurora Veil may activate it when receiving Damage to resist the Damage one step. Aurora Veil may be activated 2 times, and then disappears.

Ice Hammer.name: Ice Hammer
Ice Hammer.effect: The user’s Speed is lowered by 1 Combat Stage.

Laser Focus.name: Laser Focus
Laser Focus.effect: The next successful damaging attack made by the user is automatically a Critical Hit.

Revelation Dance.name: Revelation Dance
Revelation Dance.effect: Revelation Dance is the same Type as the user’s primary Type (the first one listed in the Pokédex). Revelation Dance deals +5 Bonus Damage for every other Dance Move used by the user this round, to a maximum of +15.

Spotlight.name: Spotlight
Spotlight.effect: Until the end of the user’s next turn, the target is Blinded and Vulnerable.

Swagger.name: Swagger
Swagger.effect: The target’s Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages. Swagger Confuses the target.

Tearful Look.name: Tearful Look
Tearful Look.effect: Tearful Look lowers all Legal Targets’ Attack and Special Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Baneful Bunker.name: Baneful Bunker
Baneful Bunker.effect: If the user is hit by an attack, the user may use Baneful Bunker. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. In addition, if the triggering attack was Melee ranged, the attacker is Poisoned.

Purify.name: Purify
Purify.effect: The target is cured of all Permanent and Volatile Statuses. For every status removed, the user recovers a Tick of Hit Points.

Toxic Thread.name: Toxic Thread
Toxic Thread.effect: The target is Poisoned and has their Speed lowered by 1 Combat Stage. If the target is already Poisoned, they instead lose a Tick of Hit Points and has their Speed lowered by 2 Combat Stages.

Instruct.name: Instruct
Instruct.effect: The target immediately reuses the attack it performed last, ignoring frequency, as a Free Action. They may choose new targets for the copied attack. Instruct may not be used if the Target’s last Move was a Set-Up Move, a Trigger Move, or Instruct, or if the Target is currently affected by Exhaust.

Hyperspace Hole.name: Hyperspace Hole
Hyperspace Hole.effect: Make and resolve of Hyperspace Hole’s attacks separately. In between each attack, the user may Shift using their Teleporter capability, ending the Shift next to a legal target. Interrupts may not be triggered against Hyperspace Hole.

Photon Geyser.name: Photon Geyser
Photon Geyser.effect: This attack uses the highest of the user’s Attack or Special Attack Stat, though it remains a Special Move. This Move ignores any Abilities that would cause it to fail or miss, such as Dodge or Wonder Guard; those Abilities cannot be activated in response to Photon Geyser.

Psychic Fangs.name: Psychic Fangs
Psychic Fangs.effect: Light Screen, Reflect and Aurora Veil cannot be declared in response to Psychic Fangs.

Psychic Terrain.name: Psychic Terrain
Psychic Terrain.effect: The Field becomes Weird for five rounds. While the Field is Weird, non-Flying and nonLevitating Pokémon cannot declare Priority or Interrupt Moves outside their own Initiatives. Damaging Psychic-Type attacks deal an additional 10 damage

Speed Swap.name: Speed Swap
Speed Swap.effect: The user and the target trade Initiative values.

Anchor Shot.name: Anchor Shot
Anchor Shot.effect: The Target is Trapped for 2 rounds. Anchor Shot may only be used from the user's Anchor Token.

Sunsteel Strike.name: Sunsteel Strike
Sunsteel Strike.effect: This Move ignores any Abilities that would cause it to fail or miss, such as Dodge or Wonder Guard; those Abilities cannot be activated in response to Sunsteel Strike.

Liquidation.name: Liquidation
Liquidation.effect: The target’s Defense is lowered by 1 Combat Stage on a 17+.

Sparkling Aria.name: Sparkling Aria
Sparkling Aria.effect: When you hit a target with Sparkling Aria, the user may choose to deal no damage and instead cure that target of Burn, Confusion, Infatuation, or Rage.

Steam Eruption.name: Steam Eruption
Steam Eruption.effect: Steam Eruption burns all legal targets on a 15+.

Hold Hands.name: Hold Hands
Hold Hands.effect: The target and the user each gain three Ticks of Temporary Hit Points, and a +2 Bonus to Save Checks for 1 full round.

Defense Curl.name: Defense Curl
Defense Curl.effect: The user’s Defense is raised 1 Combat Stage and they become Curled Up until the end of the Scene or they are Recalled or Take a Breather. When using the Moves Rollout or Ice Ball while Curled Up, the user gains a +10 bonus to the damage rolls of those Moves.

Withdraw.name: Withdraw
Withdraw.effect: The user’s Defense is raised 1 Combat Stage.

Attack Order.name: Attack Order
Attack Order.effect: Attack Order is a Critical Hit on 18+.

The first line contains the Name of the.name: The first line contains the Name of the Move. This
The first line contains the Name of the.type: Next is the Elemental Type of the Move. There
The first line contains the Name of the.damage_class: Class will denote whether the attack is Physical,
The first line contains the Name of the.range: Range specifies the distance in meters from
The first line contains the Name of the.effect: The Effect lists what the attack does in addition to the Move’s damage. Certain effects will only occur if, during Accuracy Roll, a certain number or higher is rolled. Effects do not activate unless the Move hits. Effect Ranges can be extended by other effects. For example, an effect that triggers on 18+ that has its Effect Range extended by +2 now triggers on 16+. Effects such as Features and Abilities that extend the Critical Hit or Effect Ranges of a Move cannot extend them by more than a total of +6 from their natural ranges.

Bug Bite.name: Bug Bite
Bug Bite.effect: If the target has a stored Digestion Buff or has traded in a Digestion Buff this Scene, the user may gain the effects of the Digestion Buff. This does not count towards the usual limit on the user’s Digestion Buffs.

Bug Buzz.name: Bug Buzz
Bug Buzz.range: Cone 2 or Close Blast 2, Sonic, Smite
Bug Buzz.effect: Bug Buzz lowers the Special Defense of all targets on 19+.

Defend Order.name: Defend Order
Defend Order.effect: Raise the user’s Defense and Special Defense 1 Combat Stage each.

Fury Cutter.name: Fury Cutter
Fury Cutter.effect: If Fury Cutter is used successfully and consecutively on the same target, the Damage Base is increased by +4 to a maximum of 16. For example, the first hit would have a DB of 4; the second hit a DB of 8; the third hit a DB of 12; the fourth and further hits a DB of 16. If Fury Cuter misses or fails to damage its target, its Damage Base resets.

Heal Order.name: Heal Order
Heal Order.effect: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value.

Infestation.name: Infestation
Infestation.effect: The target is put in a Vortex.

Powder.name: Powder
Powder.effect: The target is dusted with a Coat of flammable powder. If it uses a damaging Fire-Type attack, the attack is negated and instad creates a Blast 3 centered on itself as the powder explodes, and the Coat is removed. All targets within the Blast take damage equal to what the user of the Fire-Type attack would roll for the damage of their attack. This damage is Typeless or Fire- Type, whichever would be more effective.

Quiver Dance.name: Quiver Dance
Quiver Dance.effect: Raise the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by +1 Combat Stage each.

Rage Powder.name: Rage Powder
Rage Powder.effect: All targets hit by Rage Powder are Enraged. While enraged, they must shift to target the user when using a Move or Attack if the user is within reach.  If the user is Fainted or Switched out, all targets hit by Rage Powder are cured of rage.

Signal Beam.name: Signal Beam
Signal Beam.effect: Signal Beam confuses the target on 19+.

Silver Wind.name: Silver Wind
Silver Wind.effect: On 19+, the user has each of its stats raised by +1 Combat Stage.

Spider Web.name: Spider Web
Spider Web.effect: Spider Web cannot miss. The target is Stuck and Trapped. If the user is freed of the Stuck condition, they are freed of Trapped as well.

Steamroller.name: Steamroller
Steamroller.effect: Steamroller Flinches the target on 15+. If the target is Small, Steamroller deals an additional +5 Damage.

Sticky Web.name: Sticky Web
Sticky Web.effect: Set 8 square meters of Sticky Web hazards within your range, all 8 meters must be adjacent with at least one other space of Sticky Web. Sticky Web causes Terrain to become Slow Terrain, and a foe that runs into the hazard has its Speed lowered by one stage, and they become Slowed until the end of their next turn. Flying- type Pokémon and Pokémon and Trainers with Levitate are not affected by Sticky Web. Bug-type Pokémon may move over Sticky Web harmlessly, destroying the Hazards as they do so.

String Shot.name: String Shot
String Shot.effect: Targets have their Speed CS lowered by -1. If this lowers their Speed CS to -6, or if their Speed CS was already at -6, the target is instead Stuck.

Struggle Bug.name: Struggle Bug
Struggle Bug.effect: On hit, lowers the target’s Special Attack by -1 CS.

Tail Glow.name: Tail Glow
Tail Glow.effect: Raise the user’s Special Attack 3 Combat Stages.

Twineedle.name: Twineedle
Twineedle.effect: Twineedle Poisons the target on an Accuracy Check of 18+

U-Turn.name: U-Turn
U-Turn.effect: If U-Turn successfully hits its target, the user deals damage and then immediately is returned to its Poké Ball in the same turn. A New Pokémon may immediately be sent out. Using U-Turn lets a Trapped user be recalled.

Assurance.name: Assurance
Assurance.effect: When you hit with Assurance, if Assurance’s target has already been damaged by a Move on the same round Assurance is being used, Assurance has a Damage Base of 12 (3d12+10 / 30) instead. This effect may trigger only once per Scene per Target.

Beat Up.name: Beat Up
Beat Up.effect: The user and up to two allies adjacent to the target may each make a Struggle Attack against the target. These Struggle Attacks hit for Dark-Type Damage instead of their usual Type. Beat Up may trigger Pack Hunt only once, no matter the number of attacks.

Crunch.name: Crunch
Crunch.effect: Crunch lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17+

Dark Pulse.name: Dark Pulse
Dark Pulse.effect: Dark Pulse Flinches the target on 17+

Embargo.name: Embargo
Embargo.effect: The target cannot use or benefit from held items for the remainder of the encounter. Embargo may only affect one target at a time; if Embargo is used on a new target, the previous target is freed from the effect.

Fake Tears.name: Fake Tears
Fake Tears.effect: Lower the target’s Special Defense 2 Combat Stages.

Flatter.name: Flatter
Flatter.effect: The target’s Special Attack is raised by +1 Combat Stage. Flatter Confuses the target.

Fling.name: Fling
Fling.effect: The user throws a held item, determining the effect of Fling.

Foul Play.name: Foul Play
Foul Play.effect: The target reveals its Attack stat. When calculating damage, add the target’s Attack stat instead of the user’s Attack stat.

Hone Claws.name: Hone Claws
Hone Claws.effect: The user’s Accuracy is raised by +1, and the user gains +1 Attack Combat Stage.

Knock Off.name: Knock Off
Knock Off.effect: Choose one of the target’s Held Items or Accessory Slot Items. It is knocked to the ground.

Memento.name: Memento
Memento.effect: Memento may be used as a Free Action when the user becomes Fainted. Memento’s target has each of their stats lowered by -2 CS.

Nasty Plot.name: Nasty Plot
Nasty Plot.effect: Raise the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages.

Night Daze.name: Night Daze
Night Daze.effect: Night Daze lowers the target’s Accuracy by -1 on 13+.

Night Slash.name: Night Slash
Night Slash.effect: Night Slash is a Critical Hit on 18+

Parting Shot.name: Parting Shot
Parting Shot.effect: If Parting Shot successfully hits, the target’s Attack and Special Attack stats are lowered by one Combat Stage and the user is immediately recalled in the same turn. A new Pokémon may immediately be sent out. Using Parting Shot lets a Trapped user be recalled.

Payback.name: Payback
Payback.effect: If the target hit the user with a Damaging Move on the previous turn, Payback has a Damage Base of 10 (3d8+10 / 24) instead.

Punishment.name: Punishment
Punishment.effect: Punishment’s Damage Base is raised by +1 for each positive Combat Stage the target has, to a maximum of DB 12.

Pursuit.name: Pursuit
Pursuit.effect: If the foe is fleeing or being switched out, Pursuit may be used as an Interrupt, targeting the triggering foe. When used as an Interrupt, Pursuit grants the user a +5 bonus to all Movement Speeds, and has a Damage Base of 8 (2d8+10 / 19).

Quash.name: Quash
Quash.effect: Quash changes the target’s Initiative to 0 for the remainder of the round.

Snarl.name: Snarl
Snarl.effect: All Legal Targets have their Special Attack lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Snatch.name: Snatch
Snatch.effect: If the target uses a Self-Targeting Move, you may use Snatch. You gain the benefits of the Self-Targeting Move instead of the target.

Switcheroo.name: Switcheroo
Switcheroo.effect: The user and the target exchange Held Items or Accessory Slot Items.

Thief.name: Thief
Thief.effect: Thief takes the target’s Held Item or Accessory Slot Item and attaches it to Thief’s user, if the user is not holding anything.

Topsy-Turvy.name: Topsy-Turvy
Topsy-Turvy.effect: The target’s Combat Stages are inverted; +1 Stage becomes -1 Stage, -3 Stages becomes +3 Stages, etc.

Draco Meteor.name: Draco Meteor
Draco Meteor.effect: Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

Dragon Dance.name: Dragon Dance
Dragon Dance.effect: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Speed 1 Combat Stage.

Dragon Rage.name: Dragon Rage
Dragon Rage.effect: If it hits, Dragon Rage causes the target to lose 15 Hit Points. Dragon Rage is Special and interacts with other moves and effects as such (Special Evasion may be applied to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc.).

Dragon Rush.name: Dragon Rush
Dragon Rush.effect: The target is Pushed 3 meters. Dragon Rush Flinches the target on 17+.

Dragon Tail.name: Dragon Tail
Dragon Tail.effect: The target is Pushed 6 meters minus their Weight Class. On a roll of 15+, the target is also Tripped.

Dragon Breath.name: Dragon Breath
Dragon Breath.effect: Dragon Breath Paralyzes the Target on 15+.

Outrage.name: Outrage
Outrage.effect: After damage is dealt, the user becomes Enraged and Confused.

Roar of Time.name: Roar of Time
Roar of Time.effect: All legal targets are Slowed, even if the attack misses.

Spacial Rend.name: Spacial Rend
Spacial Rend.effect: Spacial Rend is a Critical Hit on Even-Numbered Rolls.

Twister.name: Twister
Twister.effect: Small or Medium targets in the central square of the blast are not hit. Twister Flinches the target on 18-20 during Accuracy Check. Any Pokémon Airborne as a result of Fly or Sky Drop above the Blast are hit, ignoring range, and Twister has a Damage Base of 8 against those targets instead.

Bolt Strike.name: Bolt Strike
Bolt Strike.effect: Bolt Strike Paralyzes the target on 17+.

Charge.name: Charge
Charge.effect: If the user performs an Electric Move on their next turn that deals damage, add its Damage Dice Roll an extra time to the damage. Raise the user’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Charge Beam.name: Charge Beam
Charge Beam.effect: If Charge Beam successfully hits a target, roll 1d20. On a roll of 7+,  the user’s Special Attack is raised by +1 Combat Stage.

Discharge.name: Discharge
Discharge.effect: Discharge Paralyzes all legal targets on 15+.

Eerie Impulse.name: Eerie Impulse
Eerie Impulse.effect: The target’s Special Attack is lowered 2 Combat Stages.

Electric Terrain.name: Electric Terrain
Electric Terrain.effect: The field becomes Electrified for 5 rounds. While Electrified, Pokémon and Trainers touching the ground are immune to Sleep, and Electric-Type attacks used by Pokémon and Trainers touching the ground gain a +10 Bonus to Damage Rolls.

Electrify.name: Electrify
Electrify.effect: Until the end of the user’s next turn, the target’s damaging Water-Type attacks and Melee attacks of any Type deal Electric-Type Damage instead of their usual Type.

Electro Ball.name: Electro Ball
Electro Ball.effect: The user adds their Speed Stat, including Combat Stages, in addition to their Special Attack when determining the damage dealt by Electro Ball. The Defender in turn subtracts both their Special Defense and Speed Stats from the damage dealt before applying Type Effectiveness.

Electroweb.name: Electroweb
Electroweb.effect: All Legal Targets are lowered 1 Speed Combat Stage.

Fusion Bolt.name: Fusion Bolt
Fusion Bolt.effect: If Fusion Flare was used this round or last round by any participant of the encounter, Fusion Bolt has its Damage Base increased by +3.

Ion Deluge.name: Ion Deluge
Ion Deluge.effect: An ion cloud is dispersed in the targeted area. All Normal-Type Moves targeting into or originating from the area become Electric-Typed Moves.

Magnet Rise.name: Magnet Rise
Magnet Rise.effect: The user gains the Levitate Ability for 5 turns. Magnet Rise may be activated as a Swift Action if the user is otherwise given an action that consumes a Command.

Thunder.name: Thunder
Thunder.effect: Thunder Paralyzes its target on 15+. If the target is in Sunny Weather, Thunder’s Accuracy Check is 11. If the target is in Rainy Weather, Thunder cannot miss. If the target is airborne as a result of Fly or Sky Drop, Thunder cannot miss.

Thunder Fang.name: Thunder Fang
Thunder Fang.effect: Thunder Fang Paralyzes or Flinches on 18- 19 during Accuracy Check; flip a coin to determine whether the foe gets Paralyzed or Flinches. On 20 during Accuracy Check, the foe is Paralyzed and Flinched.

Thunder Punch.name: Thunder Punch
Thunder Punch.effect: Thunder Punch Paralyzes the target on 19+.

Thunder Shock.name: Thunder Shock
Thunder Shock.effect: Thunder Shock Paralyzes the target on 17+.

Volt Switch.name: Volt Switch
Volt Switch.effect: If Volt Switch successfully hits its target, the user deals damage and then immediately is returned to its Poké Ball in the same turn. A New Pokémon may immediately be sent out. Using Volt Switch lets a Trapped user be recalled.

Volt Tackle.name: Volt Tackle
Volt Tackle.effect: Volt Tackle Paralyzes the target on 19+.

Zap Cannon.name: Zap Cannon
Zap Cannon.effect: Zap Cannon Paralyzes the target. Zap Cannon ignores the target’s Evasion if there are no other combatants or Rough or Blocking Terrain within 2 meters of the target.

Aromatic Mist.name: Aromatic Mist
Aromatic Mist.effect: All allies in Aromatic Mist’s area of effect have their Special Defense raised 1 Combat Stage.

Baby-Doll Eyes.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
Baby-Doll Eyes.effect: The target’s Attack is lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Charm.name: Charm
Charm.effect: Charm lowers the target’s Attack 2 Combat Stages.

Crafty Shield.name: Crafty Shield
Crafty Shield.effect: If the user or an Ally within 2 meters of Crafty Shield’s user is hit by a Status Move, you may use Crafty Shield as an Interrupt. All targets in Crafty Shield’s area- of-effect including the user, are instead not hit by the triggering Move and do not suffer any of its effects.

Draining Kiss.name: Draining Kiss
Draining Kiss.effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains Hit Points equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Fairy Lock.name: Fairy Lock
Fairy Lock.effect: All legal targets become Trapped and Slowed while the user remains in the encounter. This effect ends if the user switches or is Fainted.

Flower Shield.name: Flower Shield
Flower Shield.effect: All Grass Type Pokémon in Flower Shield’s area of effect have their Defense raised by +2 Combat Stages.

Misty Terrain.name: Misty Terrain
Misty Terrain.effect: The area becomes Misty for 5 turns. While Misty, all Pokémon and Trainers standing on the ground ignore the first turn of all Status Afflictions, and Dragon-type attacks targeting or originating from a grounded Pokémon or Trainer take a -10 Penalty to Damage Rolls.

Moonblast.name: Moonblast
Moonblast.effect: Moonblast lowers the target’s Special Attack by 1 Combat Stage on 15+.

Moonlight.name: Moonlight
Moonlight.effect: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value. If it is Sunny, the user gains 2/3 of its full Hit Point value. If it is Rainy, Sand Storming or Hailing the user gains 1/4 of their full Hit Point value.

Play Rough.name: Play Rough
Play Rough.effect: Play Rough lowers the target’s Attack 1 Combat Stage on 17-20 during Accuracy Check.

Sweet Kiss.name: Sweet Kiss
Sweet Kiss.effect: The target becomes Confused. On miss, the target suffers a -2 penalty to Accuracy Rolls for one full round.

Brick Break.name: Brick Break
Brick Break.effect: Light Screen and Reflect may not be activated in response to Brick Break.

Bulk Up.name: Bulk Up
Bulk Up.effect: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Circle Throw.name: Circle Throw
Circle Throw.effect: The target is Pushed 6 meters minus their Weight Class. On 15+, the target is also Tripped.

Close Combat.name: Close Combat
Close Combat.effect: The user’s Defense and Special Defense are each lowered by -1 Combat Stage.

Counter.name: Counter
Counter.effect: Counter may be used as a Reaction when the user is hit by a damaging Physical Attack. Resolve the Triggering Attack, with Counter’s user resisting the attack one step further. After the attack is resolved, if Counter’s user was not Fainted, the triggering foe then loses Hit Points equal to twice the amount of Hit Points lost by the user from the triggering attack. Note that Counter is Physical, and while it cannot miss, it cannot hit targets immune to Fighting-Type Moves.

Cross Chop.name: Cross Chop
Cross Chop.effect: Cross Chop is a Critical Hit on 16+.

Detect.name: Detect
Detect.effect: If the user is hit by a Move, the user may use Detect. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects.

Drain Punch.name: Drain Punch
Drain Punch.effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Dynamic Punch.name: Dynamic Punch
Dynamic Punch.effect: Dynamic Punch Confuses the target. Dynamic Punch ignores the target’s Evasion if they are Flanked.

Final Gambit.name: Final Gambit
Final Gambit.effect: Final Gambit lowers the user to 0 Hit Points and causes them to Faint. Final Gambit then deals 1 point of damage to the target for every Hit Point lost by the user. Final Gambit does not cause items to activate.

Focus Blast.name: Focus Blast
Focus Blast.effect: Focus Blast lowers the target’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 18+.

Focus Punch.name: Focus Punch
Focus Punch.effect: Use of Focus Punch must be declared as a Priority  (Limited) action at the beginning of the round. Nothing happens at this time. At the end of the round, if the target hasn’t been hit by an attack dealing damage equal to at least 25% of the user’s Maximum Hit Points, the user may Shift and use Focus Punch. Focus Punch’s Frequency is not expended if it is negated by an attack.

Force Palm.name: Force Palm
Force Palm.effect: Force Palm Paralyzes the target on 18+.

Hammer Arm.name: Hammer Arm
Hammer Arm.effect: The user lowers their Speed 1 Combat Stage.

High Jump Kick.name: High Jump Kick
High Jump Kick.effect: If High Jump Kick misses, the user loses Hit Points equal to 1/4th of their Max Hit Points. A failure to hit due to a Move with the Shield keyword does not count as a miss. This Move cannot be used if Gravity is in effect.

Jump Kick.name: Jump Kick
Jump Kick.effect: If Jump Kick misses, the user loses Hit Points equal to 1/4th of their Max Hit Points. A failure to hit due to a Move with the Shield keyword does not count as a miss. This Move cannot be used if Gravity is in effect.

Karate Chop.name: Karate Chop
Karate Chop.effect: Karate Chop is a Critical Hit on 17+.

Low Kick.name: Low Kick
Low Kick.effect: Low Kick’s Damage Base is equal to twice the target’s Weight Class.

Low Sweep.name: Low Sweep
Low Sweep.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed 1 Combat Stage.

Mat Block.name: Mat Block
Mat Block.effect: If the user or an adjacent ally is hit by a damaging attack, the user may use Mat Block. The attack instead does not hit any targets, and it deals no damage and no has effects. You may only use Mat Block during the first round of an encounter.

Power-Up Punch.name: Power-Up Punch
Power-Up Punch.effect: If Power-Up Punch successfully hits a target, the user’s Attack is raised by +1 Combat Stage

Quick Guard.name: Quick Guard
Quick Guard.effect: If the user or an adjacent ally is targeted by a Priority or Interrupt Attack, Quick Guard may be declared as an Interrupt, causing the triggering attack to have no effect.

Revenge.name: Revenge
Revenge.effect: When declaring Revenge, the user does nothing and may not Shift. At the end of the round, the user may shift and use Revenge. If the target has damaged the user this round, Revenge has a Damage Base of 12 (3d12+10 / 30).

Reversal.name: Reversal
Reversal.effect: For each Injury the user has, Reversal’s Damage Base is increased by +1.

Rock Smash.name: Rock Smash
Rock Smash.effect: Rock Smash lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17+.

Rolling Kick.name: Rolling Kick
Rolling Kick.effect: Rolling Kick Flinches the target on 15+.

Secret Sword.name: Secret Sword
Secret Sword.effect: When calculating damage, the target subtracts their Defense from Secret Sword’s damage instead of their Special Defense. Secret Sword is still otherwise Special ( Special Evasion is used to avoid it, Mirror Coat can reflect it, etc. ).

Seismic Toss.name: Seismic Toss
Seismic Toss.effect: The target loses Hit Points equal to the level of Seismic Toss’ user.

Sky Uppercut.name: Sky Uppercut
Sky Uppercut.effect: Sky Uppercut may be used as an Interrupt when against a target initiating Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop to allow the user to Shift and use Sky Uppercut. If Sky Uppercut successfully hits its target, the triggering Move fails (though the target may take their next turn normally).

Storm Throw.name: Storm Throw
Storm Throw.effect: If Storm Throw hits, it is a Critical Hit.

Submission.name: Submission
Submission.effect: On an accuracy roll of 15+, the target is Tripped.

Superpower.name: Superpower
Superpower.effect: Superpower lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by 1 Combat Stage each.

Vital Throw.name: Vital Throw
Vital Throw.effect: If the user is targeted by a Melee attack and has not yet taken a turn this round, the user may declare Vital Throw. After the triggering attack is resolved, the user may use Vital Throw against the triggering foe as a Reaction. Vital Throw cannot miss.

Wake-Up Slap.name: Wake-Up Slap
Wake-Up Slap.effect: If the target is Asleep, Wake-Up Slap has a Damage Base of 10 (3d8+10 / 24) instead, and cures the target of Sleep.

Blaze Kick.name: Blaze Kick
Blaze Kick.effect: Blaze Kick Burns the target on 19+, and is a Critical Hit on 18+.

Blue Flare.name: Blue Flare
Blue Flare.effect: Blue Flare Burns the target on 17+.

Eruption.name: Eruption
Eruption.effect: For each 10% of Hit Points the user is missing, Eruption’s Damage Base is reduced by 1. Eruption creates a 1 meter burst, but also affects an area 10 meters tall straight up.

Fiery Dance.name: Fiery Dance
Fiery Dance.effect: If Fiery Dance successfully hits a foe, it raises the user’s Special Attack by 1 Combat Stage on Even- Numbered Rolls.

Fire Blast.name: Fire Blast
Fire Blast.effect: Fire Blast burns the target on 19+.

Fire Fang.name: Fire Fang
Fire Fang.effect: Fire Fang Burns or Flinches on 18-19 during Accuracy Check; flip a coin to determine whether the foe gets Burned or Flinches. On 20 during Accuracy Check, the foe is Burned and Flinches.

Fire Pledge.name: Fire Pledge
Fire Pledge.effect: If an ally uses Grass Pledge or Water Pledge, you may use Fire Pledge as Priority (Advanced) immediately after their turn to target the same foe. If used in conjunction with Grass Pledge, Fire Hazards are created in a Burst 1 around the target.  If used in conjunction with Water Pledge, a Rainbow is created that lasts for 5 rounds.  Consult the Pledge keyword for additional details.

Fire Punch.name: Fire Punch
Fire Punch.effect: Fire Punch Burns the target on 19+ during Accuracy Check.

Fire Spin.name: Fire Spin
Fire Spin.effect: The target is put in a Vortex.

Flame Burst.name: Flame Burst
Flame Burst.effect: Any Trainers or Pokémon cardinally adjacent to the target lose 5 Hit Points.

Flame Charge.name: Flame Charge
Flame Charge.effect: Raise the user’s Speed 1 Combat Stage.

Flame Wheel.name: Flame Wheel
Flame Wheel.effect: Flame Wheel Burns the target on 19+.

Flare Blitz.name: Flare Blitz
Flare Blitz.effect: Flare Blitz Burns the target on 19+.

Fusion Flare.name: Fusion Flare
Fusion Flare.effect: If Fusion Bolt was used this round or last round by any participant of the encounter, Fusion Flare has its Damage Base increased by +3.

Heat Crash.name: Heat Crash
Heat Crash.effect: For each weight class the user is above the target, increase Heat Crash’s Damage Base by +2.

Heat Wave.name: Heat Wave
Heat Wave.effect: Heat Wave Burns all Legal Targets on 18+.

Incinerate.name: Incinerate
Incinerate.effect: If a target is holding a Held Item or Main or Off- Hand item, they must either drop it immediately or lose a Tick of Hit Points. This may only cause a target to lose at most one Tick of Hit Points, no matter how many items they were holding.

Inferno.name: Inferno
Inferno.effect: Inferno Burns the target. Inferno ignores the target’s Evasion if there are no other combatants or Rough or Blocking Terrain within 2 meters of the target.

Lava Plume.name: Lava Plume
Lava Plume.effect: Lava Plume burns all targets on 16+.

Magma Storm.name: Magma Storm
Magma Storm.effect: The target is put in a Vortex; this effect occurs even if Magma Storm misses its target.

Mystical Fire.name: Mystical Fire
Mystical Fire.effect: Mystical Fire lowers the target’s Special Attack by 1 Combat Stage.

Overheat.name: Overheat
Overheat.effect: Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

Sacred Fire.name: Sacred Fire
Sacred Fire.effect: Sacred Fire Burns the target on Even-Numbered Rolls.

Searing Shot.name: Searing Shot
Searing Shot.effect: Searing Shot Burns all targets on 15+.

Sunny Day.name: Sunny Day
Sunny Day.effect: The weather becomes Sunny for 5 rounds. While Sunny, Fire-Type Attacks gain a +5 bonus to Damage Rolls, and Water-Type Attacks suffer a -5 Damage penalty.

V-Create.name: V-Create
V-Create.effect: Lower the user’s Defense, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 CS each.

Acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
Acrobatics.effect: If the user is not holding an item, Acrobatics instead has a Damage Base of 11 (3d10+10 / 27).

Aeroblast.name: Aeroblast
Aeroblast.effect: Aeroblast is a Critical Hit on an Even-Numbered Roll.

Air Cutter.name: Air Cutter
Air Cutter.effect: Air Cutter is a Critical Hit on 18+.

Air Slash.name: Air Slash
Air Slash.effect: Air Slash Flinches the target on 15+.

Bounce.name: Bounce
Bounce.effect: The user first Shifts, gaining a +1 Bonus to Movement Speed and to their Jump Capabilities. After the user Shifts, they may attack with Bounce. The target becomes Vulnerable, and is Paralyzed on 16+.

Brave Bird.name: Brave Bird
Brave Bird.effect: The target is pushed back 2 meters.

Defog.name: Defog
Defog.effect: The Weather becomes Clear, and all Blessings, Coats, and Hazards are destroyed. Clear Weather is the default weather, conferring no innate bonuses or penalties of any sort.

Dragon Ascent.name: Dragon Ascent
Dragon Ascent.effect: The user’s Defense and Special Defense are each lowered by -1 Combat Stage.

Feather Dance.name: Feather Dance
Feather Dance.effect: All legal targets have their Attack lowered 2 Combat Stages.

Gust.name: Gust
Gust.effect: If the target is airborne as a result of Fly or Sky Drop, Gust can hit them, ignoring Range and has a Damage Base of 8 instead.

Hurricane.name: Hurricane
Hurricane.effect: Hurricane Confuses its target on 15+. If the target is in Sunny Weather, Hurricane’s Accuracy Check is 11. If the target is in Rainy Weather, Hurricane cannot miss. If the target is airborne as a result of Fly or Sky Drop, Hurricane cannot miss.

Mirror Move.name: Mirror Move
Mirror Move.effect: Use the Move the target has used on their last turn. You may choose new targets for the Move. Mirror Move cannot miss.

Oblivion Wing.name: Oblivion Wing
Oblivion Wing.effect: The user gains Hit Points equal to Oblivion Wing’s Damage Roll.

Pluck.name: Pluck
Pluck.effect: Pluck takes the target’s Held Item or Accessory Slot Item and attaches it to Pluck’s user, if the user is not holding anything.

Roost.name: Roost
Roost.effect: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Points. If the user is a Flying Type, it loses the Flying Type until the start of their next turn.

Tailwind.name: Tailwind
Tailwind.effect: For the remainder of the encounter, all allied trainers and Pokémon gain +5 to their Initiative. Multiple instances of Tailwind cannot stack.

Astonish.name: Astonish
Astonish.effect: Astonish Flinches the target on 15+. Once per scene, if the target is unaware of the user’s presence, Astonish automatically Flinches the target.

Curse.name: Curse
Curse.effect: If the user is not a Ghost Type, Curse has a Frequency of EOT, and when used the user lowers its Speed by -1 Combat Stage, but raises Attack and Defense by +1 Combat Stage each.  If the user is a Ghost Type, Curse has a Frequency of Scene, and when used the user loses 1/3rd of their Max Hit Points and a target Pokémon or Trainer within 8 meters of the user becomes Cursed. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented in any way.

Destiny Bond.name: Destiny Bond
Destiny Bond.effect: All enemy targets in the burst become Bound to the user until the end of the user’s next turn. If a Bound target causes the user to Faint through a Damaging Attack, the Bound target immediately faints after their attack is resolved.

Grudge.name: Grudge
Grudge.effect: You may use Grudge as an Interrupt when a Damaging Attack causes the user to faint. Grudge is activated as a Free Action (does not take up a Command). The attack is resolved as usual, and the user Faints. The attacker that caused the user to Faint becomes Suppressed for the remainder of the encounter; switching and Taking a Breather does not end Suppression when used this way.

Hex.name: Hex
Hex.effect: Once a Scene, if Hex’s target has a Status Affliction, you may have Hex’s Damage Base be 13 instead (4d10+10 / 35).

Lick.name: Lick
Lick.effect: Lick Paralyzes the target on 15+ during Accuracy Check.

Night Shade.name: Night Shade
Night Shade.effect: The target loses Hit Points equal to the level of Night Shade’s user. Do not apply weakness or resistance. Do not apply stats.

Nightmare.name: Nightmare
Nightmare.effect: Nightmare can only hit Legal Targets that are Asleep. The target gains Bad Sleep.

Ominous Wind.name: Ominous Wind
Ominous Wind.effect: On 19+, the user has each of its stats raised by +1 Combat Stage.

Shadow Ball.name: Shadow Ball
Shadow Ball.effect: Shadow Ball lowers the foe’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17+.

Shadow Claw.name: Shadow Claw
Shadow Claw.effect: Shadow Claw is a Critical Hit on 18+.

Spite.name: Spite
Spite.effect: Spite may be used as a Free Action that does not take up a Command whenever the user is hit by a Move. That Move becomes Disabled for the attacker.

Trick-or-Treat.name: Trick-or-Treat
Trick-or-Treat.effect: The target gains the Ghost Type in addition to its other Types for 5 turns.

Absorb.name: Absorb
Absorb.effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains Hit Points equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Aromatherapy.name: Aromatherapy
Aromatherapy.effect: All allies in the burst are cured of one status condition of their choice.

Cotton Guard.name: Cotton Guard
Cotton Guard.effect: Raise the user’s Defense 3 Combat Stages.

Cotton Spore.name: Cotton Spore
Cotton Spore.effect: All Legal Targets have their Speed lowered 2 Combat Stages.

Energy Ball.name: Energy Ball
Energy Ball.effect: Energy Ball lowers the foe’s Special Defense 1 Combat Stage on 17+.

Forest’s Curse.name: Forest’s Curse
Forest’s Curse.effect: The target gains the Grass Type in addition to its other Types for 5 turns.

Giga Drain.name: Giga Drain
Giga Drain.effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains Hit Points equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Grass Knot.name: Grass Knot
Grass Knot.effect: Grass Knot’s Damage Base is equal to twice the target’s Weight Class.

Grass Pledge.name: Grass Pledge
Grass Pledge.effect: If an ally uses Fire Pledge or Water Pledge, you may use Grass Pledge as Priority (Advanced) immediately after their turn to target the same foe. If used in conjunction with Fire Pledge, Fire Hazards are created in a Burst 1 around the target.  If used in conjunction with Water Pledge, the target and all foes adjacent to the target are slowed and have their Speed reduced by 2 Combat Stages.  Consult the Pledge keyword for additional details.

Grassy Terrain.name: Grassy Terrain
Grassy Terrain.effect: The area becomes Grassy for 5 rounds. While Grassy, all Pokémon and Trainers standing on the ground recover a Tick of Hit Points at the start of every turn, and Grass-Type attacks performed by grounded Pokémon and Trainers gain a +10 bonus to Damage Rolls.

Horn Leech.name: Horn Leech
Horn Leech.effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains Hit Points equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Ingrain.name: Ingrain
Ingrain.effect: Ingrain applies a Coat to the user, which has the following effect; the user cannot be pushed or pulled, and cannot be switched out.  At the beginning of each of the user’s turn, the user gains a Tick of Hit Points.

Leaf Blade.name: Leaf Blade
Leaf Blade.effect: Leaf Blade is a Critical Hit on 18+.

Leaf Storm.name: Leaf Storm
Leaf Storm.effect: Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

Leaf Tornado.name: Leaf Tornado
Leaf Tornado.effect: Small or Medium targets in the central square of the blast are not hit. On 15+, all legal targets have their Accuracy lowered by -1.

Leech Seed.name: Leech Seed
Leech Seed.effect: At the beginning of each of the target’s turns, Leech Seed’s target loses a Tick of Hit Points. Leech Seed’s user then gains Hit Points equal to the amount the target lost. Leech Seed lasts until the target faints or is returned to a Poké Ball. Grass Types and targets immune to Grass Attacks are immune to Leech Seed.

Mega Drain.name: Mega Drain
Mega Drain.effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains Hit Points equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target.

Needle Arm.name: Needle Arm
Needle Arm.effect: Needle Arm Flinches the target on 15+.

Petal Dance.name: Petal Dance
Petal Dance.effect: After damage is dealt, the user becomes Enraged and Confused.

Razor Leaf.name: Razor Leaf
Razor Leaf.effect: Razor Leaf is a Critical Hit on 18+.

Seed Flare.name: Seed Flare
Seed Flare.effect: All Legal Targets have their Special Defense lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Spiky Shield.name: Spiky Shield
Spiky Shield.effect: If the user is hit by an attack, the user may use Spiky Shield. The user is instead not hit by the Move. You do not take any damage nor are you affected by any of the Move’s effects. In addition, if the triggering attack was Melee ranged, the attacker loses a Tick of Hit Points.

Synthesis.name: Synthesis
Synthesis.effect: The user regains Hit Points equal to half of its full Hit Point value. If it is Sunny, the user gains 2/3 of its full Hit Point value instead. If it is Rainy, Sand Storming or Hailing the user gains 1/4 of their full Hit Point value instead.

Worry Seed.name: Worry Seed
Worry Seed.effect: You choose one of the target’s Abilities. Worry Seed changes that Ability to Insomnia for the remainder of the encounter.

Bone Club.name: Bone Club
Bone Club.effect: Bone Club Flinches the target on 18+.

Bulldoze.name: Bulldoze
Bulldoze.effect: All Legal Targets are lowered 1 Speed Combat Stage.

Drill Run.name: Drill Run
Drill Run.effect: Drill Run is a Critical Hit on 18+.

Earth Power.name: Earth Power
Earth Power.effect: Earth Power lowers the Special Defense of all Legal Targets 1 Combat Stage on 16+.

Earthquake.name: Earthquake
Earthquake.effect: Earthquake can hit targets that are underground, including those using the Move Dig.

Fissure.name: Fissure
Fissure.effect: Roll 1d100. This roll may not be modified in any way.  If you roll X or lower, the target Faints. X is equal to 30 + The User’s Level - The Target’s Level.

Magnitude.name: Magnitude
Magnitude.effect: When you use Magnitude, roll 1d6.  Magnitude’s Damage Base is equal to 5+X, where X is the value of the d6. Magnitude can hit targets that are underground, including those using the Move Dig.

Mud Bomb.name: Mud Bomb
Mud Bomb.effect: The target’s Accuracy is lowered by -1 on 16+.

Mud Shot.name: Mud Shot
Mud Shot.effect: The target’s Speed is lowed by -1 Combat Stage.

Mud Sport.name: Mud Sport
Mud Sport.effect: All targets in the burst, including the user, gain a Coat which grants them 1 Step of Resistance to Electric Type Moves. After a target has been hit by a damaging Electric Type Move, the coat is removed.

Mud-Slap.name: Mud-Slap
Mud-Slap.effect: The target’s Accuracy is lowered by -1.

Rototiller.name: Rototiller
Rototiller.effect: All Grass-type Pokémon in the area raise their Attack and Special Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Sand Tomb.name: Sand Tomb
Sand Tomb.effect: The target is put in a Vortex.

Sand Attack.name: Sand Attack
Sand Attack.effect: The target is Blinded until the end of their next turn.

Spikes.name: Spikes
Spikes.effect: Set 8 square meters of Spikes within your range, all 8 meters must be adjacent with at least one other space of Spikes. Spikes cause terrain to count as Slow Terrain, and a grounded foe that runs into the hazards will lose a Tick of Hit Points and become Slowed until the end of their next turn.

Aurora Beam.name: Aurora Beam
Aurora Beam.effect: Aurora Beam lowers the target’s Attack 1 Combat Stage on 18+.

Avalanche.name: Avalanche
Avalanche.effect: When declaring Avalanche, the user does nothing and may not Shift. At the end of the round, the user Shifts and uses Avalanche on any legal target. If the target damaged the user this round, Avalanche has a Damage Base of 12 (4d10+15 / 40) instead.

Blizzard.name: Blizzard
Blizzard.effect: Blizzard Freezes all legal target on 15+. If the target is in Hailing Weather, Blizzard cannot miss.

Freeze-Dry.name: Freeze-Dry
Freeze-Dry.effect: When calculating Weakness and Resistance for Freeze-Dry, Water-Typed targets calculate damage as if Water was weak to Ice.

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.effect: If Frost Breath hits, it is a Critical Hit.

Glaciate.name: Glaciate
Glaciate.effect: All Legal Targets have their Speed lowered 1 Combat Stage. On an Even-Numbered Roll, all Legal Targets on the ground are Slowed.

Hail.name: Hail
Hail.effect: The weather changes to Hail for 5 rounds. While it is Hailing, all non-Ice Type Pokémon lose a Tick of Hit Points at the beginning of their turn.

Haze.name: Haze
Haze.effect: The Combat Stages of the user and all Pokémon and Trainers in the encounter are set to their default state (usually 0).

Ice Ball.name: Ice Ball
Ice Ball.effect: The user continues to use Ice Ball on each of its turns until they miss any target with Ice Ball, or are not able to hit any target with Ice Ball during their turn.  Each successive use of Ice Ball increases Ice Ball’s Damage Base by +3 to a maximum of DB 15.

Ice Beam.name: Ice Beam
Ice Beam.effect: Ice Beam Freezes on 19+ during Accuracy Check.

Ice Fang.name: Ice Fang
Ice Fang.effect: Ice Fang Freezes or Flinches on 18+ during Accuracy Check; flip a coin to determine whether the foe gets Frozen or Flinches. On 20 during Accuracy Check, the foe is Frozen and Flinches.

Ice Punch.name: Ice Punch
Ice Punch.effect: Ice Punch Freezes the target on 19+ during Accuracy Check.

Icicle Crash.name: Icicle Crash
Icicle Crash.effect: Icicle Crash Flinches the target on 15+.

Icy Wind.name: Icy Wind
Icy Wind.effect: All Legal Targets have their Speed lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Mist.name: Mist
Mist.effect: Blessing – Any user affected by Mist may activate it when having Combat Stages lowered by any effect; if they do, those Combat Stages are instead not lowered. Mist may be activated 3 times, and then disappears.

Powder Snow.name: Powder Snow
Powder Snow.effect: Powder Snow Freezes all Legal Targets on 19+.

Sheer Cold.name: Sheer Cold
Sheer Cold.effect: Roll 1d100. This roll may not be modified in any way.  If you roll X or lower, the target Faints. X is equal to 30 + The User’s Level - The Target’s Level.

Acupressure.name: Acupressure
Acupressure.effect: Roll 1d6. On a result of 1, raise the target’s Attack 2 Combat Stages. On a result of 2, raise the target’s Defense 2 Combat Stages. On a result of 3, raise the target’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages. On a result of 4, raise the target’s Special Defense 2 Combat Stages. On a result of 5, raise the target’s Speed 2 Combat Stages. On a result of 6, raise the target’s Accuracy by +2.

After You.name: After You
After You.effect: After You is a Swift Action. The target takes their turn for the round immediately after the user finishes their turn, ignoring Initiative. After You may only affect a target that has not yet acted that round and can only affect willing targets.

Assist.name: Assist
Assist.effect: Randomly select another Pokémon on the user’s roster and then randomly select a Move that Pokémon knows. Assist’s user uses that Move immediately.

Attract.name: Attract
Attract.effect: Attract Infatuates the target if its gender is the opposite of the user’s. Attract fails when used by or against Genderless targets.

Baton Pass.name: Baton Pass
Baton Pass.effect: The user is replaced with another Pokémon from their trainer’s roster. All Combat Stage, Coats, and [Stratagems] on Baton Pass’ user are transferred to the replacement. Baton Pass may be used to switch even if the user is Trapped.

Belly Drum.name: Belly Drum
Belly Drum.effect: The user gains +6 Attack Combat Stages, and loses Hit Points equal to ½ of their Max Hit Points.

Bestow.name: Bestow
Bestow.effect: The user gives its held item to the target, unless the target is already holding an item. Using Bestow is a Swift Action.

Bide.name: Bide
Bide.effect: The user may use Bide as a Reaction Move upon being Hit by a Damaging Move. During their next available turn, the user may Shift and then use Bide, causing all Adjacent foes to lose X HP, where X is the amount of Damage taken since declaring use of Bide (Loss of life through effects such as Poison is not ‘Damage’).

Bind.name: Bind
Bind.effect: The user gains a +1 Bonus to Accuracy Rolls made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers, and +2 to Skill Checks made to initiate Grapple Maneuvers or gain Dominance. Whenever the user gains Dominance in a Grapple, the target of the Grapple loses a Tick of Hit Points.

Block.name: Block
Block.effect: The target is Stuck and Trapped until the beginning of your next turn.

Body Slam.name: Body Slam
Body Slam.effect: Body Slam Paralyzes the target on 15+.

Camouflage.name: Camouflage
Camouflage.effect: The user changes their Type to match the field. Forests and grassy areas change the user into Grass- Type. Watery areas change the user into Water-Type. Caves and Mountains could change the user into Rock- Type or Ground-Type. An icy terrain would turn the user into Ice-Type. A building may change the user into Steel-Type or Normal-Type. Weather affects what Type the user becomes. Use common sense, if you are having difficult determining what type the user should become, consult the GM.

Captivate.name: Captivate
Captivate.effect: Captivate lowers the target’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages. Captivate may not affect something that is the same gender as the user or something that is genderless.

Chip Away.name: Chip Away
Chip Away.effect: Ignore any Armor, Damage Reduction, or changes in the target’s Defense or Special Defense (such as from Combat Stages) when calculating damage.

Confide.name: Confide
Confide.effect: The target’s Special Attack is lowered 1 Combat Stage.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.effect: Constrict lowers the target’s Speed 1 Combat Stage. Constrict may be used as a Swift Action against targets the user is Grappling, and automatically hits when performed this way.

Conversion.name: Conversion
Conversion.effect: The user becomes the elemental Type of their choice as long as they have a Move that is the same elemental Type until the end of the encounter. Replace all other Types.

Conversion2.name: Conversion2
Conversion2.effect: The user becomes the elemental Type of their choice as long as the Type resists the elemental Type of the Move it last took damage from until the end of the encounter. Replace all other Types.

Copycat.name: Copycat
Copycat.effect: Use the Move the target has used on their last turn. You may choose new targets for the Move. Copycat cannot miss.

Covet.name: Covet
Covet.effect: Covet takes the target’s Held Item or Accessory Slot Item and attaches it to Covet’s user, if the user is not holding anything.

Crush Claw.name: Crush Claw
Crush Claw.effect: Crush Claw lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on Even-Numbered Rolls.

Crush Grip.name: Crush Grip
Crush Grip.effect: For every 10% the target is below their full Hit Points, Crush Grip’s Damage Base is reduced by 1.

Cut.name: Cut
Cut.effect: Cut ignores up to 5 Damage Reduction (Defenses are not Damage Reduction).

Disable.name: Disable
Disable.effect: Disable may be used as a Free Action that does not take up a Command whenever the user is hit by a Move. That Move becomes Disabled for the attacker.

Dizzy Punch.name: Dizzy Punch
Dizzy Punch.effect: Dizzy Punch Confuses the target on 17+

Double Team.name: Double Team
Double Team.effect: The user gains 3 activations of Double Team. The user may either activate Double Team when being targeted by an attack to increase their Evasion by +2 against that attack; or when making an attack to increase their Accuracy by +2 for that attack.

Echoed Voice.name: Echoed Voice
Echoed Voice.effect: If Echoed Voice was used by any Pokémon or Trainer in the Encounter on the previous round, increase its Damage Base by +4. If Echoed Voice was used by any Pokémon or Trainers during both the previous two rounds, increase its Damage Base by +8.

Encore.name: Encore
Encore.effect: Roll 1d6. On a result of 1 or 2, the target becomes Confused; on a result of 3 or 4 the target becomes Suppressed; on a result of 5 or 6 the target becomes Enraged.

Endeavor.name: Endeavor
Endeavor.effect: The target loses a Tick of Hit Points for each Injury the user has.

Endure.name: Endure
Endure.effect: If the user is hit by a damaging Move, you may use Endure as a Free Action. If the Move would bring Endure’s user down to 0 Hit Points or less, Endure’s user instead is set to 1 Hit Point.

Entrainment.name: Entrainment
Entrainment.effect: The target gains one of the user’s Abilities for 3 turns.

Explosion.name: Explosion
Explosion.effect: The user’s Hit Points are set to -50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss cannot be prevented or reduced in any way. The user’s loyalty toward its trainer may be lowered.

Façade.name: Façade
Façade.effect: If the user is afflicted with a Persistent Status Affliction, Façade’s Damage Base is doubled to DB 14 (4d10+15 / 40).

Fake Out.name: Fake Out
Fake Out.effect: You may only use Fake Out with Priority upon joining an encounter; if you do, Fake Out Flinches the target. Switching out resets the requirement of joining an encounter.

False Swipe.name: False Swipe
False Swipe.effect: False Swipe’s damage cannot bring a target lower than 1 Hit Point.

Feint.name: Feint
Feint.effect: If a foe uses a Move with the Shield Keyword in response to one of your actions, you may activate Feint to cause the triggering Move to Fail. Feint is activated as a Free Action.

Flail.name: Flail
Flail.effect: For each Injury the user has, Flail’s Damage Base is increased by +1.

Flash.name: Flash
Flash.effect: The Accuracy of all Legal Targets is lowered by -1.

Focus Energy.name: Focus Energy
Focus Energy.effect: The user becomes Pumped. While Pumped, the user’s Critical Range is extended by 2, or 18+ if the Critical Range is not otherwise extended. Being switched will cause this effect to end.

Follow Me.name: Follow Me
Follow Me.effect: Until the end of the user’s next turn, all Foes must target the user when using a Move that targets their opponents. This effect ends if the user is Fainted or Switched out.

Foresight.name: Foresight
Foresight.effect: Foresight may be activated as a Swift Action on the user’s turn. For the rest of the turn, the user’s Normal-Type and Fighting-Type Moves can hit and affect Ghost-Type targets, and the user can see through the Illusion Ability, Moves with the Illusion keyword, and effects created by the Illusionist Capability, ignoring all effects from those.

Frustration.name: Frustration
Frustration.effect: Frustration’s Damage Base is equal to 9 minus the user’s Loyalty Value. Using Frustration may make your Pokémon dislike you.

Growl.name: Growl
Growl.effect: Growl lowers all Legal Targets Attack 1 Combat Stage.

Growth.name: Growth
Growth.effect: Raise the user’s Attack 1 Combat Stage and raise the user’s Special Attack 1 Combat Stage. If it is Sunny, double the amount of Combat Stages gained.

Guillotine.name: Guillotine
Guillotine.effect: Roll 1d100. This roll may not be modified in any way.  If you roll X or lower, the target Faints. X is equal to 30 + The User’s Level - The Target’s Level.

Harden.name: Harden
Harden.effect: Raise the user’s Defense 1 Combat Stage.

Head Charge.name: Head Charge
Head Charge.effect: The target is Pushed back 2 meters.

Heal Bell.name: Heal Bell
Heal Bell.effect: All targets are cured of any Persistent Status ailments.

Helping Hand.name: Helping Hand
Helping Hand.effect: Helping Hand grants the target +2 on their next Accuracy Roll this round, and +10 to the next Damage Roll this round.

Hidden Power.name: Hidden Power
Hidden Power.effect: When a Pokémon first obtains the Move Hidden Power, roll 1d20.
